zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短线偏空下行，关注关键支撑
zh.content:
当前BTC/USD报60684.9美元，24小时下跌1.08%，价格运行于日内低位附近，显示空头仍占据主动。短期走势已跌破20日均线62269附近，市场情绪偏谨慎，整体结构呈现震荡偏弱格局。

从技术指标看，MACD值为-781.10，位于零轴下方，表明中短期动能仍然偏空。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但价格持续位于均线下方运行，说明反弹力度有限，空头趋势尚未出现明显扭转信号。

关键支撑位首先关注60600美元附近，该区域为日内低点所在，若有效跌破，后续可能测试60000美元整数关口。上方阻力位位于61450美元附近，其次为20日均线62270美元区域，反弹至该区间或面临较强抛压。

交易策略方面，短线投资者宜保持谨慎，优先顺应趋势操作。激进者可关注反弹至61450美元附近的做空机会，并严格设置止损；稳健投资者则建议等待价格重新站稳20日均线后，再考虑布局中期多头仓位，以降低趋势延续下跌的风险。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is trading near 60,685 after a modest 24-hour decline of 1.08%, remaining under pressure following rejection from the 61,400 region. The current price sits well below the 20-day simple moving average at 62,269, indicating that the short-term trend remains bearish. The inability to reclaim the moving average suggests sellers continue to control market direction, while lower highs and weakening momentum point to cautious sentiment among participants.

Momentum indicators also favor a defensive outlook. Although the RSI value is unavailable, the MACD reading of -781.10 reflects significant negative momentum and confirms that bearish forces remain dominant. A deeply negative MACD generally signals that downward pressure has strengthened over recent sessions. Until momentum indicators begin to flatten or improve, any recovery attempts may face resistance from traders looking to exit positions at higher levels.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around 60,600, which closely matches the session low. A decisive break below this area could expose the psychologically important 60,000 level, followed by deeper downside risk toward the upper 59,000s. On the upside, initial resistance appears near 61,450, corresponding to the recent high. Beyond that, the 62,270 region around the 20-day SMA represents a more significant barrier that bulls must overcome to improve the technical outlook.

For traders, patience remains important while price trades beneath key resistance levels. Conservative participants may prefer to wait for a confirmed breakout above 61,450 and ideally above the 20-day SMA before considering stronger bullish exposure. Short-term traders could monitor rebounds into resistance zones for potential selling opportunities, while maintaining disciplined risk management. A sustained hold above support may encourage range trading, but a breakdown below 60,600 would strengthen the bearish case and increase the probability of further declines.
